subject: [SO] Adding "update" to the list of supported operations
commit_message:
[SO] Adding "update" to the list of supported operations

Update operation was missing for vnf-topology-operation in
generic-resource-api. This "update" operation is needed to
support the "modify" Trnasport Slice use-case of CCVPN.

Issue-ID: OOM-2750
Signed-off-by: Hesam Rahimi <hesam.rahimi@huawei.com>
Change-Id: I3c36abf5d7f674abc8392b20b3c374f70bf2a520

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/2255/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/2255/ )

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/2255/ )
